title: Senior Software Engineer - Adobe India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Adobe India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Adobe India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Jodhpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Adobe India:
Adobe India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adobe India!
